summary: Comprehensive testing of Hussain Maat Foundation user management and approval features. All 22 features tested successfully - backend APIs (100%), frontend UI (100%).
passed_tests: 1. User Management Page - Table displays all users with name, phone, role, status columns and action buttons (edit, role change, disable/enable, delete)
2. User Management - Add new member dialog works with first name, last name, phone (optional) fields
3. User Management - Edit user dialog - update first name, last name, phone
4. User Management - Toggle user disable/enable status (POST /api/users/{user_id}/toggle-status)
5. User Management - Delete user functionality (DELETE /api/users/{user_id})
6. User Management - Search functionality filters users by name or phone
7. User Management - Bulk select users with checkboxes
8. Approvals Page - Tabular format with columns for member/recipient, amount, month/year, submitted by, approval count, status
9. Approvals Page - Tabs for Fees and Allocations with counts (Fees (10), Allocations (6))
10. Approvals Page - One-click approve/reject buttons (inline in table, no dialog) - verified with 'Fee approved successfully' toast
11. Approvals Page - Search functionality
12. Approvals Page - Bulk select + bulk approve/reject actions buttons appear when items selected
13. Back button present on inner pages (not dashboard) - verified on both desktop and mobile
14. Logo and 'Hussain Maat Foundation' branding on login page and sidebar
15. Admin name displayed ('Super Admin') in approval records and history views
16. Backend API - PUT /api/users/{user_id} - update user (tested and verified)
17. Backend API - DELETE /api/users/{user_id} - delete user (tested and verified)
18. Backend API - POST /api/users/{user_id}/toggle-status - disable/enable (tested both directions)
19. Backend API - POST /api/users/bulk-action - bulk disable/enable/delete (tested)
20. Backend API - POST /api/fee-submissions/bulk-approve - bulk approve/reject fees (tested)
21. Backend API - POST /api/fund-allocations/bulk-approve - bulk approve/reject allocations (tested)
22. Disabled users login blocked with 403 - 'Your account has been disabled. Contact an admin.'
seed_data_creation: Created test fee submission for 'Updated User' - December 2026 - PKR 200 to test one-click approval workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 user feedback items have been implemented and tested successfully. The User Management page has CRUD operations with table view, search, bulk select. The Pending Approvals page has been redesigned to tabular format with one-click approve/reject buttons. Back buttons are present on inner pages. Branding with 'Hussain Maat Foundation' and logo is visible on login page and sidebar. Admin names are displayed in approval records.
